name: G1 1st Floor — Eastern Section Wandering (1-in-12)
description: Wandering monster table for the eastern section of G1 1st Floor. Encounter frequency: 1 in 12. Roll 1d12; on a 1, roll 1d4 on this table.

results.text: The giantess coming from Room 11 to get her cave bear in Room 7
1 hill giant with 1–4 dire wolves from Room 22 going to Room 4
The chief and 2 ogres going to get some trophies from Room 6 to show off in the Great Hall
2–8 young giants from Room 3 heading through Room 22 to raid the pantry (Room 18)
